content:
{"settings":"{
  "vsicons.dontShowNewVersionMessage": true,
  "editor.defaultFormatter": "esbenp.prettier-vscode",
  "editor.formatOnSave": true,
  "editor.formatOnPaste": true,
  "files.autoSave": "afterDelay",
  "breadcrumbs.enabled": false,
  "editor.stickyScroll.enabled": false,
  "editor.fontLigatures": true,
  "editor.fontWeight": "500",
  "git.enableSmartCommit": true,
  "git.confirmSync": false,
  "explorer.confirmDelete": false,
  "liveServer.settings.donotShowInfoMsg": true,
  "workbench.colorTheme": "Abyss",
  "chat.agent.enabled": false,
  "window.autoDetectColorScheme": true,
  "workbench.startupEditor": "none",
  "workbench.secondarySideBar.defaultVisibility": "hidden",
  "chat.agent.codeBlockProgress": false,
  "workbench.settings.applyToAllProfiles": [
    "editor.fontFamily",
    "workbench.colorCustomizations",
  ],
  "editor.allowVariableFontsInAccessibilityMode": true,
  "editor.fontFamily": "JetBrainsMono Nerd Font",
  "editor.letterSpacing": 1,
  "terminal.integrated.defaultProfile.windows": "Command Prompt",
  "workbench.colorCustomizations": {
    "terminal.background": "#00000000",
  },
  "telemetry.feedback.enabled": false,
  "telemetry.editStats.enabled": false,
  "rest-client.enableTelemetry": false,
  "telemetry.telemetryLevel": "off",
  "editor.fontVariations": false,
  "editor.mouseWheelZoom": true,
  "terminal.integrated.fontFamily": "monospace",
  "githubPullRequests.createOnPublishBranch": "never",
  "workbench.statusBar.visible": false,
  "workbench.editor.empty.hint": "hidden",
  "security.workspace.trust.untrustedFiles": "open",
  "editor.acceptSuggestionOnEnter": "off",
  "editor.linkedEditing": true,
  "terminal.integrated.enableMultiLinePasteWarning": "never",
  "workbench.preferredLightColorTheme": "Catppuccin Mocha",
  "workbench.activityBar.location": "bottom",
  "window.confirmSaveUntitledWorkspace": false,
  "workbench.layoutControl.enabled": false,
  "chat.agentsControl.enabled": false,
  "workbench.browser.showInTitleBar": true,
  "workbench.editor.showTabs": "single",
  "editor.minimap.enabled": false,
  "window.zoomLevel": 1,
  "explorer.confirmDragAndDrop": false,
  "window.menuBarVisibility": "compact",
}
"}
